session.assistant: Excellent! Lint and type checks passed. Now let me run the complete fast CI pipeline:

tool_use.name: Agent
tool_use.param: Run `make fast-ci` from the repository root and report all output and exit code. Do not attempt to fix issues - just run the command and report the results.

session.tool_result:
## Results
**Exit Code:** 2 (failure)
**Summary:**
The `make fast-ci` command ran multiple checks with the following results:
**Passing Checks:** - Lint: All checks passed - Format Check: 1730 files already formatted - Markdown Check: PASSED (AGENTS.md standard, CLAUDE.md pairing verified) - Type Checking (ty): All checks passed - Unit Tests (erk): 6025 passed in 9.60s - Unit Tests (erk-dev): 136 passed in 3.31s - Unit Tests (erk-statusline): 115 passed in 0.69s
**Failing Checks:** 1. **Prettier Check:** Code style issues found in `/docs/learned/ci/workflow-model-policy.md` - Recommendation: Run Prettier with --write to fix
2. **Exec Reference Check:** FAILURE - Issue: `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` is out of date - Recommendation: Run `erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs` to regenerate it
The command failed due to these two issues (file formatting and stale generated reference documentation). agentId: aed1dd4ab728584e8 (for resuming to continue this agent's work if needed) <usage>total_tokens: 14624 tool_uses: 1 duration_ms: 28804</usage>
session.assistant: I have two CI issues to fix. Let me address them:

tool_use.name: Agent
tool_use.param: Run `prettier --write docs/learned/ci/workflow-model-policy.md` from the repository root and report the results.

session.tool_result:
prettier passed: File formatted successfully in 26ms
The file `/Users/schrockn/.erk/repos/erk/worktrees/erk-slot-20/docs/learned/ci/workflow-model-policy.md` has been formatted and written. agentId: a4409bcc5090b89f8 (for resuming to continue this agent's work if needed) <usage>total_tokens: 13303 tool_uses: 1 duration_ms: 3521</usage>
session.assistant: Good! Now let me regenerate the exec reference documentation:

tool_use.name: Agent
tool_use.param: Run `erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs` from the repository root and report the results and exit code.

session.tool_result:
The command executed successfully.
**Results:** - Generated `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` with proper formatting - Documented 94 top-level commands
**Exit code:** 0 (success)
The command generated reference documentation for the erk exec commands and wrote it to the skills directory for use by Claude. agentId: a28a3514c2014c0f0 (for resuming to continue this agent's work if needed) <usage>total_tokens: 13335 tool_uses: 1 duration_ms: 2888</usage>
session.assistant: Perfect! Now let me verify all CI checks pass:

tool_use.name: Agent
tool_use.param: Run complete fast CI pipeline for final verification
Run `make fast-ci` from the repository root and report the complete results including all check statuses and exit code.

session.tool_result:
## Results Summary
**Exit Code:** 0 (success)
**All checks passed.** Here's the complete status:
| Check | Status | Details | |-------|--------|---------| | Lint (ruff) | PASSED | All checks passed | | Format Check (ruff format) | PASSED | 1730 files already formatted | | Prettier Check | PASSED | All matched files use Prettier code style | | Markdown Check | PASSED | All CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md files properly paired (19 files, 0 violations) | | Exec Reference Check | PASSED | `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` up to date | | Type Check (ty) | PASSED | All checks passed | | Unit Tests (erk) | PASSED | 6025 passed in 7.82s | | Tests (erk-dev) | PASSED | 136 passed in 3.33s | | Tests (erk-statusline) | PASSED | 115 passed in 0.64s | | Tests (erk-mcp) | PASSED | 28 passed |
The fast-ci suite completed successfully with all quality checks and tests passing. agentId: ab9efa3bd527e62bb (for resuming to continue this agent's work if needed) <usage>total_tokens: 14537 tool_uses: 1 duration_ms: 24809</usage>
